summary: Completed frontend testing of Personal Mode simplification. All 10 features tested and verified: Personal Dashboard with 4 tabs (Retirement, Portfolio, Assets, Management), Unlisted Investments page, and simplified navigation structure (Dashboard → Planning → Investments → Tools → Settings).

minor.issue: API call fails with 'Failed to fetch' error in PersonalDashboard.jsx - retirement data not loading from API

issues: Recharts warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - charts may not render properly on initial load

context_for_next_testing_agent: Personal Mode restructured with unified dashboard. Compliance modal appears on page load - needs checkbox checked and 'I Understand & Accept' button clicked to dismiss. All data is MOCKED (mockAssets, mockDocuments, mockRebalancing in PersonalDashboard.jsx, mockUnlistedInvestments in UnlistedInvestments.jsx).

personal_dashboard_page.four_tabs: PASS - Retirement, Portfolio, Assets, Management tabs all found
personal_dashboard_page.quick_stats_cards: PASS - Retirement Confidence (84%), Total Net Worth ($1,850,000), Years to Retirement (20), Actions Required (3)

retirement_tab.retirement_readiness_gauge: PASS - Shows 84% confidence with radial gauge
retirement_tab.confidence_drivers: PASS - Shows Savings Strength (100%), Market Protection (100%), Longevity Coverage (100%), Spending Flexibility (40%), Diversification (70%)
retirement_tab.retirement_timeline: PASS - Shows Current Age 45 → Target Retirement 65 with progress bar

portfolio_tab.asset_allocation_pie_chart: PASS - Pie chart showing Bonds, Cash, Crypto, Hybrids, Managed Fund, Property, Shares, Super, Unlisted
portfolio_tab.holdings_by_entity: PASS - Bar chart showing Personal, Trust, Super, Company holdings
portfolio_tab.rebalancing_suggestions: PASS - Shows Australian Shares (Sell 5%), International Shares (Buy 5%), Property (Sell 5%), Bonds (Buy 5%), Cash (Hold 0%)

assets_tab.entity_filter: PASS - Dropdown with All Entities, Personal, Super, Trust, Company options
assets_tab.all_assets_list: PASS - Shows 10 assets with type badges and entity badges, filterable by entity

management_tab.tax_allocation_overview: PASS - Shows Tax-Advantaged (Super) $450,000, Trust Structure $950,000, Company Structure $50,000, Personal (Taxable) $400,000
management_tab.documents_needing_attention: PASS - Shows 3 documents: Annual Tax Return 2025 (pending), Insurance Renewal (urgent), Super Statement Review (pending)
management_tab.quick_actions: PASS - Shows Check Retirement, Rebalance Portfolio, Tax Analysis, View Documents buttons

navigation_structure.simplified_groups: PASS - 5 groups: DASHBOARD, PLANNING, INVESTMENTS, TOOLS, SETTINGS
navigation_structure.dashboard_items: PASS - Overview (NEW badge), Daily Briefing, Markets (LIVE badge)
navigation_structure.investments_items: PASS - Net Worth, Shares & ETFs, Bonds, Hybrids, Property, Unlisted (NEW badge), Cash & TDs, Managed Funds, Crypto, Super & Pension
navigation_structure.tools_items: PASS - Loan Calculator, Monte Carlo, SMSF, Tax Analysis, Capital Gains
navigation_structure.settings_items: PASS - Security, Bank Feeds, Import/Export, Documents

unlisted_investments_page.investment_list: PASS - Shows 4 mock investments (Private Equity Fund A, Venture Capital Fund, Commercial Property Syndicate, Infrastructure Fund)
unlisted_investments_page.summary_cards: PASS - Total Investments (4), Cost Basis, Current Value, Total Return (+18.6%)
